scripts.dev: pnpm --filter api dev & pnpm --filter web dev
scripts.deploy:staging: pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter @jigs/cdk deploy:staging -- --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:prod: pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter @jigs/cdk deploy:prod -- --require-approval never
